data.body:
[operator-attested] LIVE CUTOVER APPLIED (2026-07-13, admin JoeOakhartNava, refs/meta/config 9c3a32cca->21c35be51). Verified live:
- GET /projects/rebar/config => submit_type: REBASE_IF_NECESSARY (was FAST_FORWARD_ONLY).
- Live refs/meta/config project.config: 'action = rebase if necessary'; Verified copyCondition = 'changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE OR changekind:TRIVIAL_REBASE' (ADR-0047 R5 relaxation; MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE deliberately NOT added so feature-branch re-merges still re-run CI); no [label "Autosubmit"] section, no label-Autosubmit ACL, no rebase(-on-behalf) grant (all grep count=0 except the back-out comment reference).
- DRY_RUN diff was captured + validated before apply (git push --dry-run showed a clean fast-forward; only project.config changed).
- Back-out is one line: action = fast forward only + revert Verified copyCondition, re-run setup-project.sh.
AC6 (a normal change lands via plain Submit with Gerrit rebasing server-side) is being demonstrated by change #671 (the 03c6 source-file change itself) landing under the new submit type.
